parsed_review.summary:
CP00-398 (RP13 payments-core, risk A, 10 units RP13.P03.M05.S15-RP13.P03.M06.S04) reviewed read-only via Read/Grep/Glob over all 8 active implementation refs plus plan, contract, and review-hardening artifacts. The pack is internally consistent and its descriptor-verification claim is supported.

Coverage: registry binding (registry.js:103-118, 790-831), service descriptor (service.js:806-925), contract projection (cp398_requirements contract:1325-1412; p03_permission_fixture_slice_descriptor contract:8043-8302; current_pack contract:16-31; historical tail ends CP00-398 contract:8466-8480), test file (model.test.js:449-498), and validator (validate-rp13-payments-core-contract.mjs:178-413) all agree: 10 units, deliverables {claude_review:1, implementation:7, contract:2}, micro-titles {Permission And Audit Binding:6, Synthetic Fixture Set:4}, sections M05=6 rows / M06=4 rows. These match the pack baseline exactly. The validator deep-equals contract current_pack, no_write_attestation, cp398_requirements, and the full descriptor against the generated objects.

Boundaries: every descriptor row carries descriptor_only:true, runtime_execution:false, customer_safe_errors_only:true, raw_payload_included:false; all dispatch/write/persist/lock/audit flags are false and synthetic_only/no_real_data true (service.js:806-848; contract:8180-8240). Authority boundary holds: claude_is_final_approval:false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false, read_only with allowed_tools [Read,Grep,Glob] (descriptor + contract:8262-8296 + prompt). Manifest sets production_ready:false and runtime_ready:false, so the only readiness signal is the descriptor-only production_ready_candidate; there is no enterprise-trust or runtime over-claim. Hermes is used solely as a deterministic evidence/receipt descriptor (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false), not embedded product runtime.

Review hardening: readiness auth-preflight passed (exit 0, 1455-byte valid-JSON stdout, no auth failure / 0-byte / malformed output); pre-review validation commands recorded passing in command-evidence.json; post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are correctly absent/deferred per the hardening sequence; no invalid review attempt is counted as valid (valid_review_receipts=[], invalid_review_attempts=[]). Unrelated dirty/untracked files, including docs/ldip-integration/claude-review-results/c-ldip-01-invalid-attempt-01.json, are preserved outside pack scope per changed-file-scope.json and were not treated as pack content. No P0/P1/P2/P3 issues found.
